title: Kıdemli Full Stack Yazılım Mühendisi
description: Aranan Nitelikler: Bilgisayar, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya ilgili bir alanda lisans veya daha yüksek dereceye sahip, Modern web teknolojileri ve Full Stack uygulama geliştirme konusunda en az 8 yıl deneyimli, Backend tarafında ölçeklenebilir sistemler geliştirmiş (tercihen Node.js, Python, Go veya .NET Core dillerinden en az birinde uzman), Frontend tarafında güncel framework'lere (React, Vue.js veya Angular) ve TypeScript mimarisine hakim, Mikroservis mimarisi, RESTful API ve/veya GraphQL tasarımı konusunda derin bilgi sahibi, İlişkisel (PostgreSQL, MySQL) ve NoSQL (MongoDB, Redis) veri tabanı yönetiminde deneyimli, Bulut platformları (AWS, Azure veya Google Cloud) ve konteyner teknolojileri (Docker, Kubernetes) ile çalışma tecrübesine sahip, CI/CD süreçleri, versiyon kontrol sistemleri (Git) ve modern yazılım geliştirme metodolojilerine (Agile/Scrum) hakim, Tercihen IoT cihazlarından gelen verilerin web arayüzlerine entegrasyonu (WebSockets, MQTT vb.) konusunda deneyimli, İyi derecede İngilizce bilen (Teknik literatürü takip edebilen, dökümantasyon hazırlayabilen), Sıkı proje takvimlerine uyum sağlayabilme, geliştirme standartlarına (Clean Code, Design Patterns) uygun çalışabilme ve bağımsız olarak görev alabilme yetkinliğine sahip, Ekip çalışmasına uyumlu ve teknik liderlik vasıfları taşıyan, Erkek adaylar için askerlik hizmetini tamamlamış, Sorumluluk sahibi. İş Tanımı: Ürünler için uçtan uca (Full Stack) web uygulamaları tasarlamak, geliştirmek ve yayına almak, Yüksek performanslı, ölçeklenebilir ve güvenli servis mimarileri oluşturmak, Yeni ürün prototipleri ve kullanıcı arayüzleri geliştirme sürecinde Gömülü Yazılım ve Donanım Tasarım ekipleriyle koordineli çalışarak sistem entegrasyonunu sağlamak, Kullanıcı deneyimini (UX) ön planda tutan, duyarlı (responsive) web arayüzleri geliştirmek, Yazılım doğrulama, birim test (unit test) ve entegrasyon test süreçlerini yürütmek, Sistem mimarisi, API dokümantasyonu ve teknik kullanım kılavuzları hazırlamak.

title: Backend Developer
description: Nuevo Softwarehouse olarak işbirliği içerisinde olduğumuz ve Bankacılık sektöründe faaliyet gösteren iş ortağımızın ATM ve POS Çözümleri projelerinde görev almak üzere "Backend Developer" takım arkadaşı arayışımız bulunmaktadır. Genel Nitelikler: ISO-8583 protokolünde geliştirme yapmış, Tercihen C# dilinde geliştirme yapan, Switch otorizasyon, pos başvuru, takas ve gün sonu süreçlerinde deneyimli, Benzer pozisyonlarda (developer) minimum 6–8 yıl deneyimli ya da +8 Yıl deneyimli, Domain Driven Design ve mikroservis mimarisi hakkında bilgi sahibi, .Net Core ile geliştirme deneyimi bulunan, MS SQL ve tercihen çok katmanlı / servis tabanlı uygulamalar konusunda bilgili, Container teknolojileri (Openshift, Docker), Entity Framework Core, WCF, MVC, Web Servisleri konusunda deneyimli, RabbitMQ veya benzeri Queue Management yapıları ile çalışmış, Jira, Confluence, Git gibi araçları kullanmış, Problem çözme, planlama, takip ve raporlama yetkinliklerine sahip, Proaktif, analitik düşünebilen, ekip çalışmasına uyumlu, Erkek adaylar için askerlik hizmetini tamamlamış. Mimari tasarım, teknik analiz ve dokümantasyon yapabilme,

title: Full Stack Software Developer
description: About ICterra ICterra is a global software engineering company with offices in Munich, İstanbul and Ankara. We combine 30 years of software development experience with technology expertise and proven methodologies to provide innovative solutions to our customers across multiple industries globally. With 150+ software professionals, we have been building strategic partnerships with the world’s top IT and defence companies, providing software development and test services. Job Summary We are looking for skilled Full Stack Software Developers to design, develop, and maintain scalable applications. The ideal candidate will have strong experience in backend development using Python and modern frontend technologies including React, Redux, and JavaScript. You will work closely with cross-functional and multinational teams to deliver high-quality software solutions. Key Responsibilities Design, develop, and maintain tools and applications in a complex DevOps framework Build robust and scalable backend services using Python (e.g., Django, Flask, or FastAPI) Develop responsive and user-friendly frontend interfaces using React, Redux, and JavaScript Integrate APIs and third-party services Optimize applications for maximum speed, scalability, and performance Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code Troubleshoot, debug, and upgrade existing systems Participate in code reviews and contribute to team best practices Required Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent experience) Proven experience as a Full Stack Developer or similar role Strong proficiency in Python for backend development Solid experience with React , Redux , and modern JavaScript (ES6+) Experience with RESTful API design and integration Experience with relational databases (e.g., PostgreSQL, MySQL, MS-SQL Server) Understanding of version control systems such as Git Preferred Qualifications Understanding of microservices architecture Familiarity with containerization tools like Docker, orchestration with Kubernetes Experience with CI/CD pipelines, understanding of the flows is a big plus Knowledge of event streaming platform Apache Kafka

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Biz Kimiz AdsOffice Yazılım Teknoloji, yapay zeka odaklı teknoloji çözümleri ve dijital dönüşüm alanında uzmanlaşmış, bütünsel bir yazılım şirketidir. CRM sistemleri ve kurumsal yazılım geliştirmeden LLM tabanlı yapay zeka çözümlerine, web & mobil uygulamalardan marka stratejisi ve dijital pazarlamaya kadar geniş bir yelpazede hizmet sunuyoruz. Her projede teknolojiyi yaratıcılıkla buluşturarak işletmelerin ihtiyaçlarına özel, ölçülebilir sonuçlar üretiyoruz. Geliştirdiğimiz çözümlerin büyük bölümünü yapay zeka destekli mimarilerle inşa ediyor; ileri teknolojilerle müşterilerimize rekabet avantajı sağlıyoruz. Ege Bölgesi merkezli olmakla birlikte Türkiye genelinde ve global ölçekte hizmet verebilme kapasitesine sahibiz. Strateji, yazılım, tasarım ve dijital pazarlama disiplinlerini tek çatı altında buluşturan uzman ekibimizle, işletmeniz için doğru teknoloji ortağı olmaya hazırız. Görev Tanımı E-ticaret ve web projeleri ekibimizi büyütüyoruz! Mevcut projelerimizin geliştirilmesi, revizyonu ve yeni web site ve projelerin hayata geçirilmesinde aktif rol alacak bir takım arkadaşı arıyoruz. Junior Full-Stack Web Geliştirici • PHP & Laravel • HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap • JavaScript & jQuery • Hazır tasarımları (Figma/PSD) frontend'e dönüştürebilme • Versiyon kontrol sistemleri (Git) bilgisi tercih sebebidir Aranan Nitelikler • Junior seviye (1-2 yıl deneyim ideal, yeni mezunlar da değerlendirilir) • Manisa'da ikamet eden veya taşınabilecek adaylar • Öğrenmeye açık, sorumluluk sahibi • Takım çalışmasına yatkın • İşini zamanında ve kaliteli teslim edebilen İş Tanımı: • Mevcut e-ticaret ve web projelerinde geliştirme ve revizyon çalışmaları • Yeni gelen tasarımların frontend kodlamasını yapma • Şirketimize ait özel CMS sistemi ile entegrasyonlar geliştirme • Müşteri taleplerine uygun güncellemeleri hayata geçirme Neler Sunuyoruz? • AI destekli geliştirme kültürü • Hibrit çalışma modeli ve esnek performans değerlendirmesi. • Geniş teknoloji yelpazesinde sürekli öğrenme fırsatı. Lokasyon: Manisa (Ofisten çalışma) 📩 Başvurular için CV'nizi mesaj olarak iletebilir veya ilan üzerinden başvurabilirsiniz.

title: Backend Developer
description: ABOUT THE TEAM Uber Eats Trendyol Go , originally founded as the instant delivery arm of Trendyol, one of Turkey’s leading e-commerce platforms, was acquired by Uber to join forces in accelerating the future of local commerce and on-demand delivery. Born from a dynamic startup spirit and backed by Uber Eats Trendyol Go , Uber Eats Trendyol Go connects local merchants, couriers, and customers in real time to meet everyday needs with speed and reliability. Our on-demand platform offers instant delivery for food, groceries, and more bringing convenience and choice right to the doorsteps of millions. As part of Uber, the world’s largest mobility and delivery technology platform, we combine local market expertise with cutting-edge technology to redefine urban delivery. We are committed to powering seamless experiences that enable customers to get what they want, when they want it, while creating flexible earning opportunities for couriers. With a mission to strengthen local commerce and foster positive impact on merchants and couriers, Uber Eats Trendyol Go is evolving rapidly expanding its offerings and reach, innovating with technology, and delivering exceptional service every step of the way. YOUR MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES Innovate & Enhance: Develop cutting-edge features that millions rely on every day, Learn & Grow: Continuously expand your skills with the latest technologies, Collaborate & Deliver: Work in a dynamic team to build high-quality solutions. QUALITIES WE ARE LOOKING FOR Team Player: Humble, lifelong learner with a customer-first mindset, Practical Knowledge: Proficient in OOP, design patterns, clean code, software craftsmanship culture, refactoring, unit and integration testing, Experience: 5+ years of experience in at least one of the following languages: Java, Go, C#, Scala, Kotlin, or Node,js Database Management: Experience with relational and non-relational database management systems such as PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch, Couchbase, etc., Messaging Patterns: Experience with messaging patterns like Saga and Outbox, and message brokers such as Kafka, RabbitMQ, etc., CI/CD Experience: Proficient in Continuous Integration and Continuous Delivery; familiar with Infrastructure as Code tools such as Terraform, Backend Services: Experience in building backend services using mainstream frameworks, Agile Mindset: Agile-minded team player with strong communication skills, Distributed Systems: Preferably experienced in fault-tolerant and loosely coupled distributed architectures, Containerization: Experience with Kubernetes, observability, monitoring, and resource optimization is a significant plus, Language Skills: Good command of written and spoken English. JOIN US AND Take ownership from day one and grow your skills in a collaborative, international environment Experience a start-up spirit with the stability of a large tech company. Tackle impactful challenges in local commerce using agile practices. Be part of a creative, focused team that values collaboration and results. Access a rich learning platform for ongoing personal and professional development. Work with global experts, supported by mentoring and upskilling opportunities. Advance based on talent and impact — not just job titles. Stay connected through engaging team events, meetings, and social activities. Enjoy top-tier benefits. Balance flexibility and team bonding through our hybrid work model, including the summer model to work remotely opportunity We look forward to your application! We operate on a hybrid model, combining the efficiency of remote work with the collaboration of in-person teamwork. Teams come together on designated days to foster creativity and connection.Note: Hybrid work applies only to hybrid roles. Some positions may require regular on-site presence.

title: Backend & Systems Engineer (GraphQL / Apollo Server)
description: Backend & Systems Engineer (GraphQL / Apollo Server) Arıyoruz! İstanbul’da konumlanan iş ortağımızın projesinde görev alacak, backend geliştirme ve sistem kurulum süreçlerinde aktif rol oynacak ekip arkadaşı arıyoruz. 🔍 Genel Nitelikler Minimum 6 yıl backend development deneyimi Çok iyi derecede İngilizce (yazılı ve sözlü) GraphQL mimarisi konusunda deneyim Apollo Server kurulumu ve yönetimi tecrübesi API tasarımı ve geliştirme (REST / GraphQL) konularında güçlü bilgi Sistem kurulumu, deployment ve genel backend mimarilerine hakimiyet Tercihen Node.js ekosisteminde deneyim Versiyon kontrol sistemleri (Git vb.) ile çalışma deneyimi 💼 Sorumluluklar Apollo Server kurulumu ve yönetimi GraphQL tabanlı API katmanlarının oluşturulması ve geliştirilmesi Mevcut sistemlerle entegrasyon süreçlerinin yürütülmesi Backend mimarisinin geliştirilmesi ve iyileştirilmesi Performans ve ölçeklenebilirlik odaklı çözümler geliştirilmesi 📩 Başvuru Başvurularınızı CV’niz ile birlikte aşağıdaki mail adresine iletebilirsiniz: 📮 hr@nexum.com.tr

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: Apilex is a global legaltech company building AI that transforms how legal professionals work. Powered by a proprietary database of 200M+ court decisions and legal documents, our platform delivers semantic search, contract analysis, and automated legal drafting — turning days of legal research into seconds. Since our founding, we've grown to a team of 90+ people and established ourselves as Türkiye's leading AI legal assistant. Now, we're taking it global — expanding into France, Germany, Brasil, Italy and Spain to compete in the billion-dollar legaltech market. What sets us apart? We don't use off-the-shelf AI. We build domain-specific, closed-circuit AI models with multi-layered verification systems that eliminate hallucinations and deliver answers backed by real citations and legal reasoning. Every feature we ship changes how lawyers work, not in theory, but in practice. We are hiring a Senior Backend Engineer to design and scale the high-traffic microservices that form the backbone of our global legal AI platform. Key Responsibilities Scalable Architecture: Design and develop high-traffic, scalable microservice architectures to support our expanding global footprint. Code Excellence: Raise the bar on code quality by leading code review processes and implementing best practices across the backend. Technical Leadership: Provide mentorship to the engineering team and guide technical decision-making for complex features. System Integration: Build and maintain reliable integrations between core services, AI agents, and large-scale data stores. Performance Optimization: Ensure system reliability and low latency across distributed services through efficient caching and messaging strategies. What We’re Looking For 5+ years of backend experience building and scaling Java and Spring Boot applications in production Strong foundation in software architecture design including OOP and SOLID principles across various scales Hands-on experience with both PostgreSQL and MongoDB including the ability to design hybrid data architectures Deep knowledge of Elasticsearch or similar technologies for high-performance search and indexing Practical experience with messaging systems like RabbitMQ or Kafka and in-memory caching with Redis Solid understanding of WebSocket and real-time streaming architectures for distributed environments Direct experience with cloud platforms and building automated CI/CD pipelines Ability to ship high-quality code and iterate quickly rather than waiting for perfect conditions Why join us? We're building the AI that lawyers rely on every day, across every area of their practice — the core of how thousands of legal professionals research, draft, and reason. You'll join a team solving one of the hardest challenges in AI: making it reliable enough for high-stakes, real-world decisions. We're scaling across Europe and Latin America, shipping fast, and setting the bar for what reliable AI looks like in legal. Whatever your role, your work here will be visible and meaningful. We're one of the fastest-growing AI companies in Türkiye, and we're looking for ambitious people who want to build the future of legal technology on a global stage. This is Apilex. AI for Legal. Join us.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Established in 1994 by two visionary airline executives, Hitit Computer Services Inc. has since become one of the world's leading airline and travel IT solutions and business services providers. Türkiye's first airline and travel technology company, Hitit, is the technological partner of more than 60 domestic and foreign airline companies. Hitit, the world's 3rd largest aviation software company , exports the software produced by Turkish engineers to 40+ countries on 6 continents. In its headquarter located in Türkiye's one of the largest technology centers, ITU Technopark , Hitit produces software solutions that enable millions of passengers to travel every year. By combining aviation and technology, Hitit offers an experience at the heart of two dynamic, trend-setting, and promising sectors, which provides a different and stimulating experience for those who want to have a global business experience and pursue a career in the field of travel technologies that will shape the future. We are looking for a Full Stack Develope r to join our growing team. Qualifications: Bachelor’s degree is required, preferably in Computer Engineering 2+ years of full-stack development experience Proficiency in English is required, both written and spoken Java development experience Experience with HTML5/CSS3, jQuery libraries, Bootstrap 3&4 Decent knowledge of object-oriented programming Experience with Java Technologies: Java /J2EE: Spring, Spring Boot Frameworks Experience with Java Web Technologies: JSF, Thymeleaf etc. Experience with web services (SOAP / REST client and server) Knowledge of design patterns and clean coding Able to work in a complex and fast-paced environment and to manage multiple projects at one time. Strong problem-solving and relationship management competencies Proven analytical aptitude, critical thinking, and strong perceptive skills Nice to have: Comprehensive understanding of web standards Ability to analyze, monitor and improve stability & performance of Java Application Having regular reporting habits and attaching importance to documentation Closely following new technologies Intellectually curious with a strong willingness to learn Good communicator and collaborative team player Candidates should have no restrictions regarding domestic or international travel. While not required immediately, the position may involve 1–2 international business trips per year, depending on the employee’s progress and role development.

title: React Native Developer
company: TalenTown İnsan Kaynakları - İşe Alım Ajansı
description: Yeni geliştirmekte olunan, kısa video odaklı mobil uygulama projesi için dönemsel React Native Developer arıyoruz. Aranan Nitelikler React Native ile en az 5 yıl mobil uygulama geliştirme deneyimi iOS ve Android platformlarında uygulama yayınlama deneyimi Video streaming, media player veya short-form video feed geliştirme tecrübesi REST API entegrasyonları konusunda deneyimli Redux, Zustand veya benzeri state management yapıları hakkında bilgi sahibi Firebase, Supabase veya AWS servisleri ile çalışma deneyimi Mobil performans optimizasyonu konusunda deneyimli Git kullanımına hakim UI/UX detaylarına önem veren Agile çalışma yapısına uyum sağlayabilecek

title: .NET Full Stack Developer
description: About the Job Company Description OBSS is Turkey’s largest technology consultancy, pioneering product development and technology consulting for an AI-native future. With more than 20 years of experience and offices in Istanbul, Ankara, London, Amsterdam, and Baku, we empower leading companies in banking and finance, insurance, e-commerce, retail, and the start-up ecosystem. Our team of over 1000 talented professionals thrives on collaboration, innovation, and continuous learning. We are now looking for a .NET Full Stack Developer to join us and contribute to building high-quality, end-to-end solutions that create real business impact. OBSS is looking for a .NET Full Stack Developer to join our dynamic team and contribute to delivering end-to-end software payment solutions across diverse industries. You will work on cutting-edge projects, collaborating with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and maintain high-quality applications that solve real business problems. Main Responsibilities Collaborate with business analysts, project managers, and other stakeholders to understand and define project requirements. Design, develop, and maintain .NET-based applications, ensuring scalability, performance, and security. Participate in the full software development life cycle, including planning, coding, testing, and deployment. Conduct code reviews and provide constructive feedback to ensure code quality and adherence to coding standards. Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and issues in a timely manner. Stay current with industry trends and best practices to continuously improve development processes and technologies. Qualifications / Technical Skills Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, Software Engineering, or any relevant field. Strong experience with .NET Core, C#, MVC, WebAPI, Entity Framework, and SQL Knowledge of Angular Knowledge of Kubernetes, MSSQL, Redis, and cloud platforms (GCP preferred) Experience with test automation Eager to learn new technologies Good team player with a result-oriented attitude and analytical mindset Strong communication and interpersonal skills High energy and drive Ability to approach AI with curiosity and intention, actively incorporating AI-powered tools into workflows to enhance productivity and drive innovation. Additional Informations : Professional Growth & Learning As a tech company, we focus on reskilling and upskilling to support career growth. We offer a personalized Individual Growth Program (IGP), where employees set clear goals for each half of the year. These goals may include trainings, certifications, and personal development milestones, creating a structured roadmap for continuous improvement. The IGP helps employees strengthen both technical and soft skills, ensuring steady professional advancement. Company Culture and Values We celebrate diversity, inclusion, and equal opportunity, fostering a collaborative environment where innovation can flourish. Our culture emphasizes mentorship, knowledge sharing, and active participation in tech communities, workshops, and team events. This vibrant atmosphere empowers employees to contribute their best while feeling supported and valued. Benefits and Perks We provide competitive salaries, flexible and hybrid working arrangements, and a wide range of opportunities for growth through training programs, certifications, and workshops. In addition, we offer initiatives designed to build a supportive and engaging workplace where curiosity and collaboration are encouraged. These benefits ensure that employees feel motivated, empowered, and equipped to reach their full potential.

title: Senior Software Engineer – Digital Banking Backend Platforms
description: About Us ColendiBank is Türkiye's first AI-powered digital native universal deposit bank, pioneering the integration of advanced technology with accessible financial services. Officially launched in 2024 following the acquisition of a coveted digital banking license, the bank caters to individuals and SMEs with a focus on micro credit and innovative deposit services. As a fully digital institution, ColendiBank leverages a cutting-edge, scalable core banking platform to deliver seamless, secure, and user-friendly experiences. Its commitment to innovation positions it as a leader in redefining digital banking in Türkiye. Job Description We are seeking Senior Java Developers to join our backend engineering team and develop scalable backend systems for ColendiBank’s digital banking platform. Our team is responsible for building and maintaining the backend services positioned between mobile banking channels and core banking systems, focusing on seamless orchestration, integration, security, and customer-facing banking experiences. We are looking for experienced developers with strong backend engineering expertise in: Java & Spring Boot development API Gateway & BFF implementations Backend integrations and orchestration Authentication and security flows High-volume transactional systems Key Responsibilities Develop scalable and high-performance backend services using Java and Spring Boot Design and maintain microservices and RESTful APIs Contribute to API Gateway and BFF (Backend for Frontend) architectures and implementations Work on authentication, routing, orchestration, security, and integration patterns across digital banking channels Collaborate with mobile, product, and core banking teams to deliver reliable banking services Improve system performance, resiliency, and maintainability What We're Looking For Strong hands-on experience in Java and Spring Boot Experience with microservices architecture and RESTful APIs Solid knowledge of API Gateway and BFF concepts and implementations Experience in high-volume transactional systems Strong understanding of backend architecture and system integrations PostgreSQL knowledge is required Oracle experience is a plus Join Us At ColendiBank, you'll be at the forefront of creating a digital bank that delivers unparalleled customer experience. We offer opportunities for professional growth and the chance to be part of a committed team aiming to make a difference in the digital banking landscape. Embark on this transformative journey with us. Apply now to become a key player in our growing core team. ColendiBank is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

title: Senior Java Backend Developer (Hybrid)
description: Job Description 💻 Role Overview We are looking for a Senior Java Backend Developer to join our international team and contribute to the design, development, and optimization of scalable backend systems. 🔧 Key Responsibilities Develop and maintain backend applications using Java 17/21 & Spring Boot Design and implement microservice architectures Work with RabbitMQ/Kafka, Redis/Couchbase, and Oracle/PostgreSQL Contribute to system modernization and transformation projects Ensure high performance, scalability, and code quality Participate in CI/CD processes and use tools like SonarQube Make architectural decisions and optimize application performance 🎯 Requirements 7+ years of experience in Java backend development Strong knowledge of Spring Boot and microservices Experience with messaging systems (RabbitMQ/Kafka) Familiarity with databases (Oracle, PostgreSQL) and caching systems Experience in CI/CD pipelines and code quality practices Solid understanding of concurrency, transactions, and performance optimization Fluent in Turkish and English Strong analytical thinking and communication skills 🌟 Nice to Have Experience with Weblogic Background in mobile backend development Participation in digital transformation projects 👉 If you’re passionate about Java, microservices, and building scalable systems, we’d love to hear from you! Amaris Consulting is committed to promoting diversity within its workforce and to creating an inclusive work environment. We consider applications from all qualified individuals, regardless of gender, sexual orientation, race, ethnic origin, beliefs, age, marital status, disability, or any other characteristic. Special attention will be given to candidates with disabilities. Ç1 Who are we? Amaris Consulting is an independent technology consulting firm providing guidance and solutions to businesses. With more than 1,000 clients across the globe, we have been rolling out solutions in major projects for over a decade – this is made possible by an international team of 7,600 people spread across 5 continents and more than 60 countries. Our solutions focus on four different Business Lines: Information System & Digital, Telecom, Life Sciences and Engineering. We’re focused on building and nurturing a top talent community where all our team members can achieve their full potential. Amaris is your steppingstone to cross rivers of change, meet challenges and achieve all your projects with success. At Amaris, we strive to provide our candidates with the best possible recruitment experience. We like to get to know our candidates, challenge them, and be able to give them proper feedback as quickly as possible. Here's what our recruitment process looks like: Brief Call : Our process typically begins with a brief virtual/phone conversation to get to know you! The objective? Learn about you, understand your motivations, and make sure we have the right job for you! Interviews (the average number of interviews is 3 - the number may vary depending on the level of seniority required for the position). During the interviews, you will meet people from our team: your line manager of course, but also other people related to your future role. We will talk in depth about you, your experience, and skills, but also about the position and what will be expected of you. Of course, you will also get to know Amaris: our culture, our roots, our teams, and your career opportunities! Case study : Depending on the position, we may ask you to take a test. This could be a role play, a technical assessment, a problem-solving scenario, etc. As you know, every person is different and so is every role in a company. That is why we have to adapt accordingly, and the process may differ slightly at times. However, please know that we always put ourselves in the candidate's shoes to ensure they have the best possible experience. We look forward to meeting you!

title: React Native Developer
description: Senior React Native Developer 🌍 Istanbul, ofisten (Cropy AI, Inc.) | 💼 Full-time & Part-time İstanbul dışında ikamet eden adayların başvuruları değerlendirmeye alınmayacaktır. Yalnızca İstanbul’da yaşayan adaylarla görüşme yapılacaktır. Cropy AI is revolutionizing automotive listings with AI that turns outdoor car photos into consistent, studio-quality visuals for dealerships, distributors, auction platforms, and classifieds. With 45+ countries using our app, customers standardize every listing by replacing backgrounds and placing brand logos on plates/backgrounds for a clean, unified look—at scale. We’re hiring a Senior React Native Developer (4+ years) to actively drive the end-to-end development of our mobile application and deliver a fast, reliable, and polished product. We are particularly looking for a talented developer who has sufficient experience in competitive programming (algorithms & data structure) as well. What You Should Know React Native (modern versions) with TypeScript State management & architecture (Redux/Zustand, navigation patterns, modular design) Performance & memory profiling on iOS/Android (smooth UX on large images, caching strategies to reduce cellular data usage) Gesture & animation stacks (React Native Gesture Handler, Reanimated) Canvas/GPU rendering experience (e.g., React Native Skia or GL/canvas alternatives) Native modules/bridges (Swift/Objective-C, Kotlin/Java) for camera, image I/O, and performance-critical paths Networking & storage (secure uploads, retries/resumable flows, offline-first) Testing & delivery (Jest/Detox, CI/CD, crash/analytics instrumentation) Release management for App Store / Play Console Algorithms & Data Structure (tree & graph algorithms, shortest path, dynamic programming, strong problem-solving skills) Nice to Have Camera stacks (e.g., react-native-vision-camera), EXIF/metadata, basic color management Image processing concepts (gamma exposure, tint, brightness changes) Familiarity with AI/ML integrations via APIs or on-device frameworks Role & Working Style Type: Part-Time, On-site Scope: Contribute across the mobile app—architecture, features, performance, and releases. Hiring Process CV Review Take-Home Task (focused on React Native) Final Conversation We will proceed with candidates whose resumes meet our criteria; selected candidates will be invited for an interview and then given a short homework assignment. If you want to help build a high-performance mobile experience that powers studio-quality automotive listings used globally, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Node.js Backend Developer  - Crypto Payment Infrastructure
description: Londra Şehri’nde (City of London) bulunan Guardian, çalışanlarına hızlı tempolu ve iş birliğine dayalı bir ortamda kariyer gelişimi sunan, hızla büyüyen ve yenilikçi bir şirkettir. Müşterilerimizin bireysel iş ihtiyaçlarını karşılamak üzere, planlama aşamasından başlayarak işe alım ve oryantasyon süreçlerine kadar uzanan uçtan uca işe alım hizmetleri sunuyoruz. Çalışma yöntemlerimizde mükemmelliği hedeflerken, müşterilerimize işe alım sürecinin her aşamasında destek sağlıyoruz. Müşterilerimizden biri, blockchain tabanlı bir ödeme altyapısı geliştirmektedir. Platformları; birden fazla blockchain ağını izlemekte ve hot wallet ile borsalar arasında otomatik yeniden dengeleme (rebalancing) işlemleri gerçekleştirmektedir. Bu kapsamda, büyüyen ekiplerine katılacak deneyimli bir Node.js Backend Developer ariyoruz. Neler Yapacaksın? Blockchain entegrasyonları: BTC, ETH, BSC, SOL, TRON, Polygon ve diğer zincirlerde deposit/withdrawal akışları geliştirmek Mikro servis mimarisi: Monorepo servislerini geliştirmek ve bakımını yapmak Güvenlik: Kriptografik anahtar yönetimi, HD wallet türetimi, transaction signing süreçlerinde güvenliği sağlamak Performans: Yüksek hacimli blockchain event'lerini işleyen pipeline'ları optimize etmek Exchange entegrasyonu: Hot wallet ↔️ exchange arası otomatik rebalancing kuralları ve order lifecycle yönetimi Aranan Nitelikler Zorunlu: TypeScript ile production seviyesinde deneyim (strict mode, ESM) Node.js (v20+) ile backend servis geliştirme tecrübesi PostgreSQL ve bir ORM (tercihen Drizzle) deneyimi gRPC & Protocol Buffers ile servisler arası iletişim bilgisi AWS SQS veya benzeri mesaj kuyruğu sistemleri deneyimi Git ve monorepo yapılarına hakimiyet Race condition, edge case ve hata yönetimi konularında titiz yaklaşım Tercih Sebebi: Blockchain altyapısı deneyimi (RPC node'ları, transaction parsing, UTXO vs account model) BIP32/BIP44 HD wallet derivation bilgisi Redis (Bloom filter, caching) deneyimi Express.js / Fastify ile REST API tasarımı CCXT veya doğrudan exchange API entegrasyonu tecrübesi OpenTelemetry veya benzeri observability araçları deneyimi Docker, CI/CD pipeline yönetimi Teknik Ortam | Teknoloji | Detay | |---|---| | Dil | TypeScript 5.8+ (strict, NodeNext) | | Runtime | Node.js 24 | | Framework | Express 5, gRPC | | Veritabanı | PostgreSQL + Drizzle ORM | | Mesaj Kuyruğu | AWS SQS | | Cache | Redis | | Paket Yönetimi | Yarn Workspaces (monorepo) | | Test | Jest (ESM preset) | | Monitoring | OpenTelemetry | Çalışma Şekli Uzaktan çalışma Kod kalitesi ve güvenlik öncelikli kültür

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: About DualEntry Founded in 2024, DualEntry is one of the world’s fastest-growing AI startups. At DualEntry, the future of finance is being written today. ERP is one of the largest fintech markets in the world ($220,000,000,000+). Yet, tens of thousands of companies are still using on-premise systems, and the industry has not seen new entrants in more than 30 years. Our AI-native ERP lets accounting teams achieve more in less time. $5M-ARR businesses to NYSE-listed companies trust DualEntry to automate away manual data entry work with AI. We’re finally making the one-person finance team a reality and putting the pain of legacy ERPs from the 1990’s in the past. We operate with urgency and ownership. We move fast. Why this role matters now Since starting 18 months ago, we’ve raised $100,000,0000+ from world-class investors such as Lightspeed Venture Partners, Khosla Ventures, Contrary Ventures and Google Ventures, as well as more than 20 angel investors who’ve built, scaled, and exited some of the most impactful companies of the last decade. We got there by moving incredibly fast and hiring an exceptionally sharp, hard-working and deeply committed team from leading tech and accounting companies - Ramp, Meta, Microsoft, Lyft, PwC, Deloitte, J.P. Morgan, Bloomberg, Sage, Xero and Intuit. And some of us don't have a fancy logo on our resume and are here for a shot to prove ourselves. We’re a small team, growing fast with huge momentum - join early. As our Senior Backend Engineer, you’ll architect features and systems end-to-end at an incredible pace. This is an intense, hands-on role with full ownership. We expect you to push for excellence and raise the bar. 📍 Location: Remote with overlap to our New York City HQ (EST) Where you'll create impact Design and build core backend systems (Python preferred) Build APIs, services and infrastructure that handle real-time, business-critical and complex accounting logic Launch production-ready features from scratch, including CI/CD pipelines and deployment Work with product to turn complex finance workflows into performant, secure systems Manage complexity in a business-logic-heavy product, including data migrations and scale challenges Integrate third-party tools and external systems - proactively managing edge cases and risk Own your work from architecture to testing, monitoring, and post-release care What sets you up for success Hardcore work ethic and high agency 5+ years of experience in backend engineering (language agnostic) Deep experience with complex business logic products Experience deploying on AWS (or similar cloud infrastructure) Strong database skills: PostgreSQL, SQL, ORMs, migrations, schema design Experience building and testing robust APIs Solid understanding of software lifecycle, CI/CD, and production-readiness Ability to manage complex systems with evolving requirements Python and a modern web framework (FastAPI, Flask, or Django) is a plus Fluent in English (C1+) with strong written and verbal communication How you operate Pragmatic: you like to move forward and make decisions based in reality (not theory). We don't debate if Cassandra has the most theoretical scalability -- we use Postgres until it breaks Hard working: 'You can work long, hard, or smart, but [here] you can't choose two out of three" - Jeff Bezos. We wrote this job post during the weekend Curious: you love to learn, are highly curious about new frameworks and solutions to engineering problems Fast-moving: you deploy daily, iterate quickly, and never wait for permission Why you’ll thrive here Significant equity ownership in one of the top AI companies in the world You’re joining early and will grow with DualEntry Your feedback shapes the product directly High-speed culture High-trust environment with high expectations Ambitious mission - ERP is one of the largest B2B software markets in the world ($220bn per year), this is a once in a lifetime opportunity to build the next generation ERP in an industry that has not seen new entrants in 30+ years Compensation & Benefits Equity: $40,000 - $60,000 USD Base Salary: $100,000 - $175,000 USD Contract type: B2B Remote-first team - the fastest team you will have ever worked with Time Off: 27 PTO days (incl. public holidays) Visa sponsorship option for relocation to NYC within 2+ years Early-stage role with high autonomy and real long-term upside Enjoy a learning & development budget for courses, certifications, and language learning to keep growing your skills Work where you feel most productive at co-working spaces or from your home office with support for setup, internet, and phone We hire the best, expect the best, and give you the masterclass of your career - an archaic and huge industry like ERP only goes through a restructure like this once in a lifetime. It’s hard, it’s intense, and it’s the most rewarding work you’ll ever do. If you’re hungry, driven, and ready to build something massive, climb aboard!
